title: Fix wind particle animation direction (compass-to-screen angle conversion)

plan.summary: The wind particle animation uses `(windDir + 180)` to convert the meteorological 'from' compass bearing to a 'to' direction, then feeds it directly to cos/sin. But cos/sin use math angles (0°=right), not compass bearings (0°=up). This causes particles to flow 90° off from the actual wind direction. The fix is to change `+180` to `+90`, which correctly converts compass-from to screen-angle-to in one step: `screenAngle = compassFrom + 90°`.

steps.description: Fix the wind angle formula in `initParticles()` inside sailing-weather.js: change `(windDir + 180) * Math.PI / 180` to `(windDir + 90) * Math.PI / 180`, and update the comment to explain the compass→screen conversion.
